parserText:
COID/MID: 9341 / 0027-5512
CASE: ESC-2026-0517-TEST
CLIENT/CONTACT: Larkspur Roasters LLC - Jordan M.
CX IS ATTEMPTING TO: Run final payroll for a terminated California employee today.
EXPECTED OUTCOME: Final paycheck can be created with pay date 05/17/2026.
ACTUAL OUTCOME: Payroll wizard stops at step 3 with PSE_TERM_DATE_AFTER_PERIOD.
KB/TOOLS USED: Payroll help article, test company, incognito browser.
TRIED TEST ACCOUNT: Yes - same error after clearing cache.
TS STEPS: Verified employee termination date, changed payroll period, cleared cache, tried incognito, reproduced in test company.

assistantPrompt: This is a pipeline test. Give the operator a concise QBO escalation response from the parsed template, triage facts, and known issue search status. Mark the answer as test-only and do not claim this was saved.
